reason: Full PRD with requirements, decisions, architecture, and implementation order
Island Swift architecture: state management, navigation pattern, concurrency model, file layout
Codeg REST + WebSocket API shape: endpoints, request/response types, JSON conventions, deep link format
Error handling patterns for both Island and Codeg sides
Test strategy: what to test, test infrastructure, manual E2E checklist
Design system tokens: colors, typography, spacing, component specs for UI adaptation
